creator: naito@math.nagoya-u.ac.jp
text:
Ports graphics/png is updated to Version 1.4, 
png_chdck_sig function is deleted.
However, many ports collections (eg. emacs, japanese-ptex) use
this function.

Fix: 

Create a patch for png-1.4,1_1 to append
#define png_check_sig(A,B)      (!(png_sig_cmp((A),0,(B))))
in the last line of include/libpng/png.h
How-To-Repeat: Install png-1.4,1_1 and emacs, then, 
emacs can not compile.
